chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-92 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026. Mr. Bashir Ahmed Talpur, Advocate for Petitioner alongwith Petitioner (Shr. Bhajo). Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General for the State alongwith Inspector Aijaz Ahmed Soomro (SHO PS Badin). ***************************************** Mr. Rakesh Kumar Lohana, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.7 (Bhalyo), which is taken on record. It is, inter alia, contended by the learned counsel for the Petitioner that the Petitioner is being harassed by the private Respondents by way of filing Direct Complainant U/s 200 Cr.P.C, wherein it has been mentioned that the Petitioner (Shr. Bhajo) has been abducted by Raj Kumar on the night of 24/25 November, 2025. On Court query, Petitioner Shr. Bhajo present in Court contended that she has contracted marriage on account of her free will and wish without any pressure, coercion or compulsion with Raj Kumar. SHO PS Badin is present in Court and he was directed during early hearing to record the statement of Petitioner (Shr. Bhajo). Consequently, the statement has been recorded, wherein she has affirmed the above narration. The Statement is taken on record. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s), if any, with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the Petitioner and her husband. The Respondent No.2 & 3 shall ensure that no such FIR shall be lodged with regard to the above said free will marriage as the Petitioner has shown her apprehension to such malicious

Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s), if any, with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the Petitioner and her husband. The Respondent No.2 & 3 shall ensure that no such FIR shall be lodged with regard to the above said free will marriage as the Petitioner has shown her apprehension to such malicious Page 2 of 2 prosecution. The SHO PS Badin is further directed to get the PR Bond of Rs.1,000,000/- (One Million) executed from Respondent No.6 (Ramoon) under intimation to this Court. So far as the question of marriage within the relationship of cousin is concerned, the aggrieved party may approach the Family Court under Hindu Laws. Let a copy of this order be communicated to learned Civil Judge/ J.M Matli as well as SSP and SHO Badin for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
